titleStmt.title: SII 31.40: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 40. (A.R. No. B 278 of 1936.) DńÄMAGAŠĻ¨LA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up against the prńĀkńĀra wall of the temple of BhŇćgńęŇõvarasvńĀmi.
This record is dated Ňöaka 1233, VirŇćdhikŠĻõti, BhńĀdrapada, Ňõu. 2. Monday, corresponding to August 18, 1311 A.D.

It records the gift of a cow (modavu) for maintaining the oblation (divyadhńĀra) i.e. abhishńďka to the god BhŇćganńĀthadńďva of DńĀmagaŠĻ≠la by Koppera MallasńĀnamma. She also constructed one bhńďriŇõńĀla (a shed for keeping the drums) and presented one iron-drum (inupa-bhńďri) to this temple. DńĀmagaŠĻ≠la is situated in the nńĀyaŠĻĀkara territory of VńęŠłćyamu KommarńĀju.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

ra bhńĀdrapada Ňõu 2 sŇć . svastiŇõrńę manma
hńĀmaŠĻĀŠłćalńďŇõvara pratńĀpa rudradńďva
